title: BLOCK CHAIN NETWORK FOR CONDUCTING CHAIN TRANSACTIONS
abstract: The present invention describes a network of blockchains capable of cross-chain transactions. The network is a fully distributed, multi-chain network architecture that is more scalable, expandable and fault tolerant than the traditional centralized architecture. Each blockchain guarantees its own data consistency, consistency between blockchains is guarantees by a fully distributed mechanism, removing limitations associated with centralization. The blockchains can run in parallel to improve transaction efficiency and network speed and enabling a new, scalable financial market structure that financial units can easily join or leave at any time. The network includes participant blockchains and the inter-chain blockchains, and allows participant blockchains to trade with each other without the need for a central authority.
